DP.215.0000:
According to one theory, Mt. Coronet
is where the Sinnoh region began.\f
DP.215.0001:
...In a newly created world...\f
A world where only time flowed and
space expanded...\r
There should have been no strife.\f
DP.215.0002:
But what became of that world?\f
Because the human spirit is weak
and incomplete, strife has spread...\f
This world is being ruined by it...\f
I find the state of things to
be deplorable...\f
